personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Get news periodically and assign expiry time.

flows.flow_name: Periodic News Fetching and Video Generation
flows.sub_goal: To generate a new batch of multi-genre AI video news briefings and store them with a unique conv_id for user delivery.
Mark the first user's conv_id as 'ready' once all genre videos are successfully rendered.

flows.flow_name: Deliver the pre-synthesized news video set from the current 2-hour window to any user accessing the agent.
actions: Load All Videos Linked to Source conv_id
flows.sub_goal: Deliver the pre-synthesized news video set from the current 2-hour window to any user accessing the agent.
